# Acme Contracts

- **Current SOW (Q1 2025 – Q4 2025)**: data-platform retainer, fixed monthly fee. Scope: Snowflake performance tuning, ad-hoc data engineering, quarterly business reviews.
- **Migration SOW (2023 – Q2 2024)**: Redshift-to-Snowflake migration; closed on time and ~5% under budget. Led by Jane Doe.
